response.overview: Everything stems from a feeling of vengeance, misunderstanding, and coupled with an ego that knows no bounds, Jebat Zulkarnain is willing to mistreat Aisyah Humaira, his own wife. Cunningly, Jebat orchestrates a plan to make Aisyah fall in love with him, leading to a marriage with the intention of seeking revenge. Aisyah Humaira once had a romantic relationship with Jebat's younger brother, Tuah Iskandar. Without any investigation, Jebat ruthlessly passes judgment without giving Aisyah the chance to explain everything. Aisyah is accused of being unfaithful while she was with Tuah and of being the cause of the misfortune that befell his beloved younger brother. Aisyah is truly disappointed. Jebat lied about his love for her. She married Jebat not to be cherished and loved with all his heart, but because Jebat had his own agenda. Jebat's mission is only one: to settle his score and repay all of Tuah's suffering, which he claims was caused by Aisyah's betrayal in the past.
response.title: Derhaka Cinta Jebat
